<a href="league_home.aspx?GID=13">
   <img src="http://www.clanwars.cc/_Games/Generals//_cwART/small.jpg" alt="" style="border:solid 1px gray; margin-right:10px; vertical-align: top; float: left;" />
</a>
&nbsp;-- <i>clanwars news wire</i> --&nbsp;<span class="quote">"We didn't come here to lose I'll tell you that much right now.  They can have the Cup when they pry it from my cold dead hands."</span> shouted <a href="javascript:window.open('league_warrior.aspx?GID=13&WID=23548 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">ScotlanD-</a href> after he watched his men go out and beat down the #1 ranked clan in land, clan <a href="javascript:window.open('league_clan.aspx?GID=13&CID=11694 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">-]GL[-</a href>.  In an epic battle <a href="javascript:window.open('league_clan.aspx?GID=13&CID=11763 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">[iWuB]</a href> took to no map selected and then took it to <a href="javascript:window.open('league_clan.aspx?GID=13&CID=11694 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">-]GL[-</a href> and walked off with a big win that sent shockwaves down through the rest of the clans.
<br />
<br /><div style="width:425px; float:left; margin-top:8px; margin-bottom:8px; text-align:center;"></div><br />
"400 points, 400 points, man that sounds so good" said warrior <a href="javascript:window.open('league_warrior.aspx?GID=13&WID=23548 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">ScotlanD-</a href> of clan <a href="javascript:window.open('league_clan.aspx?GID=13&CID=11763 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">[iWuB]</a href> referring to the spoils picked up through his clan's efforts.  The points left <a href="javascript:window.open('league_clan.aspx?GID=13&CID=11763 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">[iWuB]</a href> sitting is spot #4 poised to make a run at this months cup.  <span class="quote">"Some say the world will end in fire, others say ice - from the blood I tasted today I say bring it on, we'll see who is left standing when it's all said and done."</span> said <a href="javascript:window.open('league_warrior.aspx?GID=13&WID=23548 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">ScotlanD-</a href>, reiterating his confident sentiments earlier, "we're ready to take this baby" - again referring to the coveted clanwars cup.
<br /><br />
With 21 days left in the tournament there are still many clans in contention.  <span class="quote">"We did all we could today."</span> said <a href="javascript:window.open('league_warrior.aspx?GID=13&WID=23428 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">Chuck</a href> of the losing clan, clearly indicating they will be back.  For complete match details go here <a href="javascript:window.open('league_game.aspx?GID=13&GameID=102988 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=40, top=40, scrollbars=yes, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">102988</a href>
    
</div>
<!-- end auto template #2 --></span></span>
</div>

<a href="league_home.aspx?GID=13">
   <img src="http://www.clanwars.cc/_Games/Generals//_cwART/small.jpg" alt="" style="border:solid 1px gray; margin-right:10px; vertical-align: top; float: left;" />
</a>
&nbsp;-- <i>clanwars news wire</i> --&nbsp;<span class="quote">"We didn't come here to lose I'll tell you that much right now.  They can have the Cup when they pry it from my cold dead hands."</span> shouted <a href="javascript:window.open('league_warrior.aspx?GID=13&WID=26943 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">`Apex-</a href> after he watched his men go out and beat down the #1 ranked clan in land, clan <a href="javascript:window.open('league_clan.aspx?GID=13&CID=11694 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">-]GL[-</a href>.  In an epic battle <a href="javascript:window.open('league_clan.aspx?GID=13&CID=13996 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">-nWo|</a href> took to no map selected and then took it to <a href="javascript:window.open('league_clan.aspx?GID=13&CID=11694 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">-]GL[-</a href> and walked off with a big win that sent shockwaves down through the rest of the clans.
<br />
<br /><div style="width:425px; float:left; margin-top:8px; margin-bottom:8px; text-align:center;"></div><br />
"220 points, 220 points, man that sounds so good" said warrior <a href="javascript:window.open('league_warrior.aspx?GID=13&WID=26943 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">`Apex-</a href> of clan <a href="javascript:window.open('league_clan.aspx?GID=13&CID=13996 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">-nWo|</a href> referring to the spoils picked up through his clan's efforts.  The points left <a href="javascript:window.open('league_clan.aspx?GID=13&CID=13996 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">-nWo|</a href> sitting is spot #2 poised to make a run at this months cup.  <span class="quote">"Some say the world will end in fire, others say ice - from the blood I tasted today I say bring it on, we'll see who is left standing when it's all said and done."</span> said <a href="javascript:window.open('league_warrior.aspx?GID=13&WID=26943 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">`Apex-</a href>, reiterating his confident sentiments earlier, "we're ready to take this baby" - again referring to the coveted clanwars cup.
<br /><br />
With 4 days left in the tournament there are still many clans in contention.  <span class="quote">"Hey I’m not saying we are the best ever, but well… we might be the best right now."</span> said <a href="javascript:window.open('league_warrior.aspx?GID=13&WID=23428 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">Chuck</a href> of the losing clan, clearly indicating they will be back.  For complete match details go here <a href="javascript:window.open('league_game.aspx?GID=13&GameID=102961 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=40, top=40, scrollbars=yes, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">102961</a href>
    
</div>
<!-- end auto template #1 --></span></span>
</div>

<div id="ctl00_ContentPlaceHolder1_divstory4" style="display:none; width:680px; text-align:left;">

<a href="league_home.aspx?GID=13">
   <img src="http://www.clanwars.cc/_Games/Generals//_cwART/small.jpg" alt="" style="border:solid 1px gray; margin-right:10px; vertical-align: top; float: left;" />
</a>
&nbsp;-- <i>clanwars news wire</i> --&nbsp;Two heavyweights walked off of no map selected earlier today, one clan knowing they belong on a short list of great clans and the other doubting all they've achieved to date, wondering if they are worthy to be called champions.
<br />
<br /><div style="width:425px; float:left; margin-top:8px; margin-bottom:8px; text-align:center;"></div><br />
<span class="quote">"I have to question if I want to be here right now, the carnage was horrific – bodies everywhere… I’ve never seen anything like it and I hope I never do again."</span> said losing clan boss <a href="javascript:window.open('league_warrior.aspx?GID=13&WID=23428 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">Chuck</a href> who swore that should these two meet again the outcome would different.  Until then though winning clan <a href="javascript:window.open('league_clan.aspx?GID=13&CID=13996 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">-nWo|</a href> had much to celebrate having just knocked off the #1 ranked clan and picking up 256 huge points leaving them all alone at rank #3 while <a href="javascript:window.open('league_clan.aspx?GID=13&CID=11694 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">-]GL[-</a href> remained at position 1.
<br /><br />
<a href="javascript:window.open('league_warrior.aspx?GID=13&WID=26943 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">`Apex-</a href> was quoted as saying <span class="quote">"We caught wind of some heavy deployments being positioned early in the day and we thought there might be some resistance out there, but we never expected what we saw.  They came in waves all day long…"</span> following his clans big win.  Men on both sides were seen yelling across the field long after the battle had ended spurring talk of a rematch.  Friday's big match can be viewed here <a href="javascript:window.open('league_game.aspx?GID=13&GameID=102946 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=40, top=40, scrollbars=yes, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">102946</a href>

    
</div>
<!-- end auto template #2 --></span></span>
</div>

<div id="ctl00_ContentPlaceHolder1_divstory5" style="display:none; width:680px; text-align:left;">

		Clan:<br />
		Points:<br />
		skill:<br />
	</td>
	<td style="width: 6px"></td>
        <td class="text10" style="width: 98px;">
		2<br />
		3-8<br />
		<a href="javascript:window.open('league_clan.aspx?GID=13&CID=13217 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">[DM]</a href><br />
		1,211<br />
		Not Yet Rated
	</td>
        <td style="width: 4px"></td>
</tr>
<tr>
	<td colspan="7" class="text10 offwhite">&nbsp;<strong>Currently on a 1 game win streak.</strong></td>
</tr>
</table>
<!-- end warrior box --><div style="height:1px; padding:0px; background-color:#565656;"></div>
         </div>

   </div>

   <!-- end spotlight div -->

<a href="league_home.aspx?GID=13">
   <img src="http://www.clanwars.cc/_Games/Generals//_cwART/small.jpg" alt="" style="border:solid 1px gray; margin-right:10px; vertical-align: top; float: left;" />
</a>
&nbsp;-- <i>clanwars news wire</i> --&nbsp;Night fell on the plains of no map selected as clans <a href="javascript:window.open('league_clan.aspx?GID=13&CID=13217 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">[DM]</a href> and <a href="javascript:window.open('league_clan.aspx?GID=13&CID=11694 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">-]GL[-</a href> marched off the field.  The quiet was in stark contrast to the war that was waged earlier in the day leaving <a href="javascript:window.open('league_warrior.aspx?GID=13&WID=23428 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">Chuck</a href>, boss of losing clan <a href="javascript:window.open('league_clan.aspx?GID=13&CID=11694 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">-]GL[-</a href> searching for answers as to what went wrong for his men.
<br />
<br /><div style="width:425px; float:left; margin-top:8px; margin-bottom:8px; text-align:center;"></div><br />
<span class="quote">"There were a lot of blood, sweat and tears spilled out there today.  I survived, that's about all I can say."</span> said <a href="javascript:window.open('league_warrior.aspx?GID=13&WID=23428 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">Chuck</a href> obviously still contemplating the outcome and visibly upset over the defeat.  Over at camp <a href="javascript:window.open('league_clan.aspx?GID=13&CID=13217 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">[DM]</a href> the revelery lasted long into the night, <span class="quote">"Some say the world will end in fire, others say ice - from the blood I tasted today I say bring it on, we'll see who is left standing when it's all said and done."</span> said <a href="javascript:window.open('league_warrior.aspx?GID=13&WID=25886 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">MurkeD</a href> who saw his clan go out and grab 220 big points to leave themselves positioned at #2.
<br /><br />
<span class="quote">"No one wanted to give up, people were throwing themselves into the line of fire just trying to push up and get some better ground.  I saw things out there I hope I never see again."</span> said <a href="javascript:window.open('league_warrior.aspx?GID=13&WID=23428 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">Chuck</a href> of the losing clan, "our effort was there, but... well there are no buts".  Both clans fought hard and were deserving of a win, but in the end only one can come out victorious.  For <a href="javascript:window.open('league_clan.aspx?GID=13&CID=13217 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">[DM]</a href> this could be a sprinboard to the coveted clanwars cup.  At press time there were 15 days left in the tournament. For complete match details go here <a href="javascript:window.open('league_game.aspx?GID=13&GameID=102942 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=40, top=40, scrollbars=yes, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">102942</a href>
 
    
</div>
<!-- end auto template #2 --></span></span>
</div>

<div id="ctl00_ContentPlaceHolder1_divstory6" style="display:none; width:680px; text-align:left;">
    <span id="ctl00_ContentPlaceHolder1_lblstory6"><div style="padding:10px; width:680px; background-color:#000000; background-image:url(images/storyTitle_back.jpg); border:ridge 1px gray; margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:0px; background-repeat:repeat-y; text-align:center;"><img src="Images/left.gif" style="border:none 0px white; vertical-align:text-bottom;" alt="" />&nbsp;&nbsp;<span class="text30 bold">#1 clan bites dust, [DM] stuns world</span></div><div style="padding:4px; width:692px; background-color:#000000; border:ridge 1px gray; border-top:0px; margin-bottom:4px; text-align:center;"><span class="text12 bold">Generals</span></div><i>clan wars news service</i>&nbsp;&nbsp;Friday, March 14, 2025 <span class="text9">8:06 PM EST</span><div style="margin-bottom:24px"></div><span style="line-height: 18px;" class="text12"><!-- auto template #2 -->

<a href="league_home.aspx?GID=13">
   <img src="http://www.clanwars.cc/_Games/Generals//_cwART/small.jpg" alt="" style="border:solid 1px gray; margin-right:10px; vertical-align: top; float: left;" />
</a>
&nbsp;-- <i>clanwars news wire</i> --&nbsp;"It was brutal out there" said <a href="javascript:window.open('league_warrior.aspx?GID=13&WID=23428 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">Chuck</a href>, "we just couldn't stop the onslaught. But, we'll be back".  The fallout continued today well after <a href="javascript:window.open('league_clan.aspx?GID=13&CID=13217 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">[DM]</a href> walked off of no map selected with a decisive victory over #1 ranked <a href="javascript:window.open('league_clan.aspx?GID=13&CID=11694 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">-]GL[-</a href>.  
<br />
<br /><div style="width:425px; float:left; margin-top:8px; margin-bottom:8px; text-align:center;"></div><br />
<span class="quote">"Our clan worked hard today."</span> said <a href="javascript:window.open('league_warrior.aspx?GID=13&WID=25886 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">MurkeD</a href> boss of the winning clan.  Other members of <a href="javascript:window.open('league_clan.aspx?GID=13&CID=13217 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">[DM]</a href> were seen celebrating back at camp and counting the 220 points they tallied that moved them into the #2 slot on the ladder.  With 17 days left in the tourney there isn't idle time...the men of <a href="javascript:window.open('league_clan.aspx?GID=13&CID=11694 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">-]GL[-</a href> were already planning a counter attack, hoping these two heavyweights will square of again soon.
<br /><br />
<span class="quote">"Look, our clan was out there laying waste, we ravaged, we pillaged and guess what...it's just the beginning."</span> said one of <a href="javascript:window.open('league_clan.aspx?GID=13&CID=13217 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=30, top=30, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">[DM]</a href>'s unknown warriors, when pressed to reveal his identity the warrior who was heading off into the night yelled back "they'll know who I am next time they dare cross us again."
<br /><br />
The battle summary can be viewed here <a href="javascript:window.open('league_game.aspx?GID=13&GameID=102930 ','_blank', 'width=800, height=800, left=40, top=40, scrollbars=yes, resizable=no, toolbar=no, location=no, status=yes'); void('');">102930</a href>
    
</div>
<!-- end auto template #2 --></span></span>
</div>

</div>

</span>
<div style="width:100%; height:1px; background-color:gray; margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:6px;"></div>
<div style="padding:20px;">
<span id="ctl00_ContentPlaceHolder1_rpglobalannouncements_ctl00_lblmsg" class="text12"><div>Please make sure you are checking the prize page monthly to see if you are eligible for a prize from CW.cc</div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>

<div style="width:100%; height:1px; background-color:gray; margin-top:20px; margin-bottom:20px;"></div>

<img src="Images/smak_newtopic.gif" style="border:none 0px white; vertical-align:baseline;" alt="" />
<span class="text20 bold">
Bracketed Tournaments online
</span>
<div style="height:10px;"></div>
by:&nbsp;
<span class="text12 bold offwhite">
clan wars
</span>
&nbsp;&nbsp;
<span class="text10 gray">
10/8/2008
</span>
<div style="width:100%; height:1px; background-color:gray; margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:6px;"></div>
<div style="padding:20px;">
<span id="ctl00_ContentPlaceHolder1_rpglobalannouncements_ctl02_lblmsg" class="text12">The bracketed tournaments are now back online.<br />
<br />
Remember tournaments can run 8, 16, 32, 64, or 128 slots either 1v1 or clan-based.<br />
<br />
Ask your admin to create a tournament and see who wins without any point chase to argue about.<br />
<br />
The staff at clanwars sincerely hopes you enjoy the newly styled tournament system. Click the "tournaments" tab from your league menu to view any tournaments for your league.<br />
<br />
-CLAN WARS
</span>
</div>

<div style="width:100%; height:1px; background-color:gray; margin-top:20px; margin-bottom:20px;"></div>

<img src="Images/smak_newtopic.gif" style="border:none 0px white; vertical-align:baseline;" alt="" />
<span class="text20 bold">
Submitting Bugs
</span>
<div style="height:10px;"></div>
by:&nbsp;
<span class="text12 bold offwhite">
clan wars
</span>
&nbsp;&nbsp;
<span class="text10 gray">
10/5/2008
</span>
<div style="width:100%; height:1px; background-color:gray; margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:6px;"></div>
<div style="padding:20px;">
<span id="ctl00_ContentPlaceHolder1_rpglobalannouncements_ctl04_lblmsg" class="text12">Thank you all for being patient while we turn up the new site and squash all the bugs that made&nbsp;it past QA.<br />
<br />
Since we went live a handful of annoying bugs have been fixed; some of the most prominent ones were the upload error bug when uploading match media; deleting PM bug; gamespy auto result bug, absolving clan bug&nbsp;and a few others all have been fixed.<br />
<br />
As you find new bugs, small or large, please post them here<br />
<br />
<font face="Georgia"><a href="https://clanwars.cc/smak_thread.aspx?ThreadID=39&amp;FID=3"><font face="Georgia">http://clanwars.cc/smak_thread.aspx?ThreadID=39&amp;FID=3</font></a></font><br />
<br />
Thanks again for your support of clanwars.cc<br />
<br />
-CLAN WARS 
<br /><br /><i>Edited by clan wars on 10/5/2008 9:09 PM</i></span>
</div>

</div>
